args.text: CVE-2026-30117: session-fixation flaw in token refresh path. Severity assessed as high, per advisory. Affects auth-api (fix v5.8.4) and session-store (fix v2.2.9).

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body: Patch window confirmed for CVE-2026-30117. auth-api will be deployed to v5.8.4 and session-store to v2.2.9.

args.text: Both auth-api (v5.8.4) and session-store (v2.2.9) are confirmed deployed and patched for CVE-2026-30117.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body: auth-api (v5.8.4) and session-store (v2.2.9) are deployed and verified. Patching for CVE-2026-30117 is complete.

args.text: Credential rotation checklist completed: active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of tonight's security maintenance (CVE-2026-30117 remediation), signing keys were rotated and all sessions invalidated. Please sign in again.
